Notice Of Motion And Motion To Amend Judgment To Correct Clerical Error Under Code Of Civil Procedure Section 473(D)
Off Calendar Jan-14-2015 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT PHIL WALKER's Motion To Amend Judgment To Correct Clerical Error Under Code Of Civil Procedure Section 473(D) - The matter is taken Off calendar. The Court did not receive courtesy copies of the moving papers in violation of SF Local Rule 2.6B. Judge: A. James Robertson II, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, Not reported. =302/ajr
